docs.title: Introduction
docs.text: This is the beginning of your road to achieve the best possible results for your English DSE exams.

docs.title: How to Use This Site
docs.text:
1. Watch videos on a topics that you want to work on

  2. Complete Exercises

  3. Check your answer and think about it

  4. Ask questions when you get stuck (My DM is open)

  5. But before you ask questions, please make sure you have done your research via Google or AI tools like poe

docs.title: What's the catch?
docs.text:
No, I'm not going to sell you my tutorial lessons, online video courses, or notes. All the matierials here are free and you can use it for you study.

However, running this site and creating content requires time and effort, so I would highly recommend you to sponsor me. More on that later.

docs.title: DSE Grammar Index
docs.text:
To get started, download the Grammar Booklet as a study guide as well 👇🏼

  • Download

docs.title: Basics
docs.text:
1. Parts of Speech
  2. Tenses (Simple)
  3. Basics Preposistion
  4. Conditional (Type 0 and 1)
  5. Comparative and Superlative Adjectives
  6. Basic Conjuncions

docs.title: Intermediate
docs.text:
1. Sentence Structure
  2. Progressive Tenses
  3. Perfect Tenses
  4. Intermediate Conditionals (Type 1 and 2)
  5. Relative Clauses
  6. Intermediate Conjunctions
  7. Intermediate Preposition
  8. Indefinite Pronouns
  9. Phrasal Verb

docs.title: Advanced
docs.text:
1. Participle Clause
  2. Advanced Tenses
  3. Advanced Conditionals (Type 3 and mixed)
  4. Sentence Patterns & Logic
  5. Advanced Structure
  6. Punctuations
